COURSE WORKBOOK
with Gretta Van Riel, Rob Ward, Chase Dimond
Richard Li, Nick Shackelford
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 4 --

In this lesson I”ll teach you how to approach
flagship/onboarding products. This type of product is
most likely what got you to where you are right now.
They’re simply your best, most pivotal products that
bring in new customers.
It’s important to understand the nature of this type of
product because everything you’ve done with your
existing product may not translate to your second
product. In other words, you’ll want to leverage
your existing business model but do away with your
approach to marketing.
ACTION ITEM
❏ 	If you’re pursuing a new flagship/onboarding
product, use the workbook to map out your
strategy.
LESSON:
FLAGSHIP/ONBOARDING
PRODUCTS
MODULE:
PRODUCT
SUCCESS FORMULA
(CREATING NEW SKUS)

-- 2 of 4 --

Flagship Strategy Questionnaire
Product:
What type of market are you trying to launch this product into?
Who is the customer persona of this market?
How can you tailor your marketing for this customer persona?
Which marketing channels can you leverage to better reach this type of customer?
